top_signals.title: Distressed Funds Explore Swap of Strategy Holdings Amid Rout
top_signals.summary: Distressed-debt funds that snapped up Strategy Inc.’s beaten-down preferred shares are in talks with one of the company’s bankers about swapping them for other securities, pitching it as a win-win as the relentless rout in crypto puts the Bitcoin accumulator in an increasingly tough spot.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: EasyJet reaches outline agreement on £5.5bn takeover by Castlelake
top_signals.summary: UK airline’s board says it is minded to recommend proposal by US private credit group
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
